scripts.test:e2e: env -u SSL_CERT_FILE PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 E2E_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000/api node ./scripts/e2e/with-local-supabase-env.mjs npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: env -u SSL_CERT_FILE PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 E2E_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000/api node ./scripts/e2e/with-local-supabase-env.mjs npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:system-smoke:script: env -u SSL_CERT_FILE E2E_APP_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 E2E_API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:4000/api node ./scripts/e2e/with-local-supabase-env.mjs node ./scripts/e2e/system-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:preview-smoke: env -u SSL_CERT_FILE playwright test -c playwright.preview.config.ts tests/e2e/creator-preview.spec.ts
scripts.verify:release: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm test:system-smoke
